summary: Admin middleware does not actively deny or redirect /admin requests; effective enforcement currently happens deeper in API handlers.
recommended_action: Tighten frontend/src/middleware.ts or server route guards so unauthorized admin navigation fails earlier.

summary: Wrong-tenant injected context fails closed with sanitized 500 instead of an explicit tenant-denied 403/404.
recommended_action: Normalize the tenant mismatch branch to an explicit denial response without changing data exposure.

summary: Dedicated blocked-admin browser-session validation was skipped because the session harness was unavailable.
recommended_action: Provision a reusable blocked/non-enterprise UI session harness and rerun the negative browser test.

summary: Archive/reanalyze/export actions do not use explicit confirmation dialogs.
recommended_action: Add lightweight confirmations if pilot operators show accidental-action risk.
